subcodes.first_line: The Book of God proclaimeth the truth: Verily, there is no God but Him, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. From the precincts of the Mount the Fire calleth out and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق بالحق انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم و النار من شطر الطور تنادی و
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
